seoTitle: How to Find Your W-2 in TurboTax (2026 Guide)
metaDescription: Locate your W-2 inside TurboTax quickly so you can start filing without digging through paperwork or waiting on a mailed copy.
intro: Your W-2 has the wage and withholding numbers TurboTax needs before it can do anything useful with your return. This walkthrough shows where to find it once it's linked to your TurboTax account, so you're not hunting through old emails or paper files during tax season.

steps.heading: Open TurboTax and sign in
steps.body: Log into your TurboTax account for the return you're working on. The overview screen for your active tax year is where document access starts.

steps.heading: Head to the W-2 section
steps.body: Navigate to the income section where W-2 forms are entered or displayed. If your employer partners with TurboTax's import feature, your W-2 details may already be pulled in and viewable there.

steps.heading: Review the imported information
steps.body: Check that your wages, federal and state withholding, and employer details match your actual W-2. This is the point to catch typos or import errors before they carry into your return.

steps.heading: Troubleshoot missing or incomplete data
steps.body: If your W-2 isn't showing up automatically, you may need to enter it manually using the paper copy from your employer or their payroll provider.

steps.heading: Confirm accuracy before moving on
steps.body: Double-check every field against your physical or PDF W-2 before continuing to the next section of your return, since these numbers flow directly into your tax calculations.

faq.question: Can TurboTax find my W-2 automatically?
faq.answer: If your employer participates in TurboTax's payroll import partnerships, your W-2 data may import automatically once you enter your employer information. Otherwise, you'll enter it manually from your paper or PDF copy.

faq.question: What do I do if my W-2 information looks wrong in TurboTax?
faq.answer: Compare each field against your original W-2 line by line. If something doesn't match, you can edit the entry manually inside the income section.

faq.question: Do I need my physical W-2 if TurboTax imports it?
faq.answer: It's still smart to keep the physical or PDF copy on hand to verify the imported numbers are accurate before you file.

faq.question: What if I never received a W-2 from my employer?
faq.answer: You'll need to contact your employer or their payroll provider directly, since TurboTax can only display a W-2 that's been issued and made available to import or enter.
